raw_notes:
Bench Press 1x2

*Start Moderate and end Heavy.

(Score is Weight)

RPE: 9

Hot Quadder

Score Rounds and Reps

AMRAP 12

6/8 Cal Bike*

15 Wall Balls (14/20#)

10 Burpee Box Jump Overs (20/24")

*C2: 10/12

(Score is Rounds + Reps)

INTERMEDIATE

AMRAP 12

5/6 Cal Bike*

15 Wall Balls (10/14#)

10 Burpee Box Jump Overs (16/20")

*C2: 8/10

FOUNDATIONS

AMRAP 12

5/6 Cal Bike* or :30 seconds

10 Wall Ball Thrusters (10/14#)

10 Elevated Burpee Box Step Overs (up to 16")

*C2: 8/10

SCORE = Rounds and Reps

WOD TYPE: EFFORT

Intended Stimulus: 6-7 Rounds

RPE: 8
